tools.name: movscript_get_context_pack
tools.description: Return current MovScript UI route, selected project, current user, selected entity, available project resources, and local draft count. Use this before project-specific work.

tools.name: movscript_search_entities
tools.description: Search scripts, settings, semantic production entities, and asset slots in the current or specified project. Use when the user names content without an exact entity ID.

tools.name: movscript_list_projects
tools.description: List all visible projects as numbered Markdown summaries.

tools.name: movscript_read_entity
tools.description: Read a single MovScript project entity by entityType and entityId. Supported entityType values are project, script, setting, asset_slot, segment, scene_moment, storyboard_script, storyboard_line, content_unit, keyframe, preview_timeline, and delivery_version.

tools.name: movscript_read_project_structure
tools.description: Read compact project structure across scripts, settings, semantic production entities, asset slots, and pipeline nodes.

tools.name: movscript_create_draft
tools.description: Create a local draft artifact for proposed scripts, settings, storyboard scripts or lines, content units, prompts, asset slots, segments, scene moments, or notes. This does not write formal project entities.

tools.name: movscript_list_drafts
tools.description: List local draft artifacts for the current or specified project. Use to review previous agent proposals.

tools.name: movscript_create_script
tools.description: Create a formal script entity in the current project after user approval. For brainstorming, first use movscript_create_draft; use this only when the user wants the generated script saved into the project.

tools.name: movscript_search_memories
tools.description: Search local agent memories by query, scope, kind, project, or thread. Use when older user preferences, decisions, warnings, entity references, or draft notes may matter.

tools.name: movscript_request_user_input
tools.description: Pause the current agent run and ask the user for missing context, a choice, confirmation, or free-form input. Use this when the next step would be a guess.

tools.name: movscript_open_entity
tools.description: Navigate the MovScript UI to an entity page such as scripts, asset slots, scene moments, content units, productions, or pipeline. Navigation only; no project data is changed.

tools.name: movscript_list_productions
tools.description: List productions in the current or specified project. Use this before production orchestration when the active production is missing or ambiguous.

tools.name: movscript_read_production_context
tools.description: Read full production orchestration context before generating production candidates.

tools.name: movscript_check_entity_conflicts
tools.description: Check proposed production candidates against existing entities before writing a proposal draft. Pass scope='project' to check CreativeReferences across all productions and get reuse_candidates.

tools.name: movscript_propose_production_entities
tools.description: Write production analysis candidates into a reviewable draft proposal. Supports tree-form proposal (action: create|reuse|update) and automatically supersedes previous draft proposals for the same production.
